zh.lifeSummary: 當Ada Calthorpe於大約1405年出生在英國諾福爾可盧達哈姆時，她的父親Sir John Calthorpe28歲，母親Amy de Wythe16歲。她於大約1435年與Colville在英國諾福爾可盧達哈姆結婚。她去世於1439年在英國素福爾可享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ada Calthorpe于大约1405年出生在英国諾福爾可盧達哈姆时，她的父亲Sir John Calthorpe28岁，母亲Amy de Wythe16岁。她于大约1435年与Colville在英国諾福爾可盧達哈姆结婚。她去世于1439年在英国素福爾可享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: Calthorpe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Ada
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of uncertain origin; it was not in general use before the late 18th century. It may be a Latinate variant of the biblical name Adah . However, it has also been explained as a pet form of Adele and Adelaide , Germanic female names of which the first element is adal ‘noble’. It was borne by a 7th-century abbess of Saint-Julien-des-Prés at Le Mans.

en.lifeSummary: When Ada Calthorpe was born about 1405, in Ludham, Norfolk, England, her father, Sir John Calthorpe, was 28 and her mother, Amy de Wythe, was 16. She married Colville about 1435, in Ludham, Norfolk, England. She died in 1439, in Suffolk, England, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ada Calthorpe est née environ 1405, à Ludham, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Calthorpe, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Amy de Wythe, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Colville environ 1435, à Ludham, Norfolk, Angleterre. Elle est décédée en 1439, à Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ada Calthorpe um 1405 in Ludham, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Calthorpe 28 und ihre Mutter Amy de Wythe 16. Sie hat um 1435 in Ludham, Norfolk, England Colville geheiratet. Sie starb 1439 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Suffolk, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ada Calthorpe è nata il circa 1405 nel Ludham, Norfolk, England, sua padre, Sir John Calthorpe, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Amy de Wythe, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Colville circa 1435, nel Ludham, Norfolk, England. Morì nel 1439, nel Suffolk, England, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ada Calthorpeが約1405年にイギリスノーフォルクルドハムで生まれた時，父Sir John Calthorpeは28歳，母Amy de Wytheは16歳であった。約1435年にイギリスノーフォルクルドハムでColvilleと結婚した。彼女は1439年にイギリススフォルクで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ada Calthorpe(이)가 대략 1405년 영국 노르폴크 루드함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Calthorpe(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Amy de Wythe(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 대략 1435년 영국 노르폴크 루드함에서 Colville(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1439년 영국 수폴크에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ada Calthorpe nasceu aproximadamente 1405, em Ludham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Calthorpe, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Amy de Wythe, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Colville aproximadamente 1435, em Ludham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Ela faleceu em 1439, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ada Calthorpe родилась около 1405 г. в местности лудхам, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Calthorpe было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Amy de Wythe, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Colville около 1435 г. в местности лудхам, норфолк, Англия. Она умерла в 1439 г. в местности суффолк, Англия в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ada Calthorpe nació aproximadamente 1405, en Ludham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Calthorpe, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Amy de Wythe, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Colville aproximadamente 1435, en Ludham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Murió en 1439, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 35 años.
